artifact: Finished means result time is present; oldest driver has the earliest date of birth.
sql: SELECT d.forename, d.surname FROM results res JOIN drivers d ON d.driverId = res.driverId WHERE res.raceId = 592 AND res.time IS NOT NULL AND res.time <> '' ORDER BY d.dob ASC LIMIT 1;
